div.class: p-4 border-bottom bg-light d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center rounded-top

div.small: Monitor field personnel check-ins, track incoming orders, and review booker performance in real-time.

button.class: btn btn-outline-secondary fw-bold shadow-sm d-inline-flex align-items-center bg-white
button.title: Refresh Live Data

span.class: badge bg-success text-white px-3 py-2 fs-6 shadow-sm d-flex align-items-center
span.title: The system is actively receiving live updates from the field apps

div.class: p-3 bg-light border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

input.placeholder: Search by Shop, Booker, or Order Ref...

span.t-attf-class: badge #{dlv.is_fully_delivered ? 'bg-success text-white' : 'bg-warning text-dark'} px-2 py-1 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark fw-bold

div.class: p-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center bg-light

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-white border
btn btn-sm btn-light border px-3 fw-bold disabled
btn btn-sm btn-white border

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 flex-wrap gap-3

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border shadow-sm fw-bold text-dark d-flex align-items-center
btn btn-sm btn-light border shadow-sm fw-bold px-3
btn btn-sm btn-primary shadow-sm fw-bold px-3 text-white d-flex align-items-center
btn btn-sm btn-dark shadow-sm fw-bold px-3 d-flex align-items-center
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary shadow-sm fw-bold px-3
btn btn-sm btn-success shadow-sm fw-bold px-4 text-white d-flex align-items-center

div.t-attf-class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 mb-4 overflow-hidden #{this.state.isEditingDelivery ? 'border border-success' : ''}

span.class: badge bg-success text-white px-3 py-2 fs-6 mb-auto shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger shadow-sm
button.title: Remove Product

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary fw-bold shadow-sm

input.placeholder: Search by Shop Name or Booker...

select.title: Filter check-ins by their current progress

div.small: When order bookers arrive at a shop and check in using their mobile app, their live activity will appear here automatically.

div.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3
bg-light rounded-circle d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center me-3 shadow-sm border

span.t-attf-class: badge #{log.status === 'Checked In' ? 'bg-success text-white shadow-sm' : log.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger text-white shadow-sm' : 'bg-secondary text-white shadow-sm'} p-2 fs-6 mb-1 d-inline-block

div.title: Total time spent at the shop

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark fw-bold ms-2
button.title: View full details of this visit

div.class: p-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center bg-light

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-white border
btn btn-sm btn-light border px-3 fw-bold disabled
btn btn-sm btn-white border
btn btn-sm btn-light border shadow-sm fw-bold text-dark d-flex align-items-center
button.title: Return to the live check-in feed

span.t-attf-class: badge #{this.state.selectedCheckin.status === 'Checked In' ? 'bg-success' : this.state.selectedCheckin.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-secondary'} text-white p-2 fs-6 text-uppercase shadow-sm

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 h-100 rounded-3

p.title: System identifier for this specific route task
Booker Notes for this specific route task

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 h-100 rounded-3
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mt-3 pt-3 border-top

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-primary shadow-sm fw-bold
button.title: Open the sales order generated during this visit

input.placeholder: Search by Shop Name, Booker, or Order Reference...

select.title: Filter orders by their current processing stage

t.title: Total monetary value and number of items requested

th.title: Current stage of the order in the system

td.small: Orders submitted by your field team will automatically populate here for confirmation and invoicing.

span.t-attf-class: badge #{ord.status === 'To Invoice' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : ord.status === 'Invoiced' ? 'bg-info text-white' : ord.status === 'Delivered' ? 'bg-success text-white' : 'bg-secondary text-white'} p-2 fs-6 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark fw-bold
button.t-att-title: this.hasFinancialAccess ? 'Open full order details and generate invoice' : 'Open full order details'

div.class: p-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center bg-light

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-white border
btn btn-sm btn-light border px-3 fw-bold disabled
btn btn-sm btn-white border
btn btn-sm btn-light border shadow-sm fw-bold text-dark d-flex align-items-center
button.title: Return to the live orders feed

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-success text-white shadow-sm fw-bold px-3 d-flex align-items-center
button.title: Generate a draft invoice for this order. This step is required for accounting.

span.t-attf-class: badge #{this.state.selectedOrder.status === 'Confirmed' ? 'bg-primary' : this.state.selectedOrder.status === 'Delivered' ? 'bg-success' : this.state.selectedOrder.status === 'Invoiced' ? 'bg-info' : this.state.selectedOrder.status === 'To Invoice' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : 'bg-secondary'} text-white p-2 fs-6 text-uppercase shadow-sm ms-2

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 h-100 rounded-3
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 h-100 rounded-3

tr.td: No order lines found. Data may still be syncing.

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.perfSubTab === 'schedules' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: View weekly route assignments

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.perfSubTab === 'targets' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: View sales and performance targets

div.class: p-3 bg-light border-bottom d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 align-items-center

select.title: Filter by day of the week

td.small: Adjust your filters or wait for routes to be assigned.

span.t-attf-class: badge #{sched.active ? 'bg-success text-white' : 'bg-secondary text-white'} px-2 py-1 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm mb-4

div.class: card p-4 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 border-primary
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 border-bottom pb-3

span.t-attf-class: badge #{this.state.selectedSchedule.active ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'} text-white px-3 py-2 shadow-sm fs-6

select.title: Filter by the type of performance goal

thead.class: bg-light text-uppercase small fw-bold text-muted text-nowrap

td.p: No targets found matching your filters.

span.t-attf-class: badge #{tgt.active ? 'bg-success text-white' : 'bg-secondary text-white'} px-2 py-1 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm mb-4

div.class: card p-4 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 border-success
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 border-bottom pb-3
position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
bg-primary text-white p-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light bg-opacity-25 border-0 text-black rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center p-2

div.class: alert alert-info border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 small d-flex align-items-center mb-4
div.div: Set the exact quantities being delivered right now. Any remaining balance will automatically be moved to a backorder by the system.

div.class: table-responsive rounded-3 border bg-white mb-4 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-light fw-bold px-4 border shadow-sm
btn btn-success fw-bold px-4 shadow-sm text-white d-flex align-items-center
